samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Divide the input frequency of 100MHz signal, and the outputs are 3 clock frequencies: 50MHz, 10MHz, 1MHz.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="CLK_in">The input clock signal</parameter>
        <parameter id="RST">Reset signal</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_50">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_10">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10</parameter>
        <parameter id="CLK_1">The output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_50">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2, to 0 when RST is active.</description>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_50">
                    <description>Set the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2, to 0 when RST is active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_50"/> <= 0;
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_50">
                    <description>Toggle the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2, when RST is not active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <false>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_50"/> <= ~<output id="CLK_50"/>;
                            </assignment>
                        </false>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_10">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10, to 0, and the counter cnt_10 to 0, when RST is active.</description>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_10">
                    <description>Set the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10, to 0, when RST is active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_10"/> <= 0;
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_10">
                    <description>Reset the counter cnt_10 to 0, when RST is not active, and the counter cnt_10 reaches a value of 4.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <false>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_10"/> <= 0;
                            </assignment>
                        </false>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_10">
                    <description>Increment the counter cnt_10 by 1, when RST is not active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_10"/> <= <output id="CLK_10"/> + 1;
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="CLK_1">
            <description>Reset the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100, to 0, and the counter cnt_100 to 0, when RST is active.</description>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_1">
                    <description>Set the output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100, to 0, when RST is active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_1"/> <= 0;
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_1">
                    <description>Reset the counter cnt_100 to 0, when RST is not active, and the counter cnt_100 reaches a value of 49.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <false>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_1"/> <= 0;
                            </assignment>
                        </false>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
            <statement>
                <combinational_logic id="CLK_1">
                    <description>Increment the counter cnt_100 by 1, when RST is not active.</description>
                    <condition>
                        <true>
                            <assignment>
                                <output id="CLK_1"/> <= <output id="CLK_1"/> + 1;
                            </assignment>
                        </true>
                    </condition>
                </combinational_logic>
            </statement>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
</module>
